creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
Hello.

I'm using freebsd 13R p7 : I've installed linux-opera from ports and from binary but it doesn't work. The error I get is :

/usr/local/lib/linux-opera/opera: error while loading shared libraries: libfreetype.so.6: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory

how to fix it ?
